title: Freelancer Hunter
description: Hunts cold-outreach prospects on X and Telegram, LLM-filters them against the freelancer's service offering, drafts a personalised pitch, and ships outreach via the user's preferred channel. TG inbound monitoring is best-effort — the orchestrator bot must already be in the channels of interest.
example_missions: Find 10 startup founders on X looking for a React contractor this week
Scout 5 prospects in TG channels asking about Solidity audits

service_offered.description: Plain-English description of what you do — e.g. 'React + TypeScript contractor with 5y SaaS experience'

target_market.description: Who you want to reach — e.g. 'YC-backed early-stage startups', 'NEAR ecosystem teams'

x_query.description: X search query. If empty, derived from service_offered + target_market.

tg_filter.description: Optional substring to filter inbound TG messages on

min_relevance_score.description: Drop X tweets scoring below this on the LLM relevance filter
